name: Prawns in Spice Laden Coconut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the dried, red chile peppers (remove stems and seeds) in a spice grinder. Adjust quantity for desired spiciness.
2. In a food processor or blender, blend grated fresh coconut until smooth. Set aside.
3. Blend cumin seeds, coriander seeds, turmeric, ginger and garlic until smooth. Set aside.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and cook until lightly browned, about 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Stir in the coconut milk mixture (from step 2) and spices (from step 3). Cook until thickened and separated into paste and liquid components.
6. Add reserved thin coconut milk to the skillet and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and let cook for 5 minutes more.
7. Stir in prawns and season with salt to taste. Simmer until prawns are cooked through, about 3-4 minutes. Avoid overcooking.
8. Serve hot over steamed rice.
